title: PRO Instrument Detail
description: View the full specification of a Patient-Reported Outcome instrument including question items, response scales, scoring algorithms, reference ranges, and OMOP concept mappings. Administer the instrument or review aggregate response data from this page.
tips: The Scoring tab shows the algorithm used to compute domain scores and total scores from raw item responses.
Reference ranges indicate clinically meaningful thresholds (e.g., PHQ-9 score ≥10 indicates moderate depression).
The OMOP Mapping tab shows how each item maps to observation_concept_id values in the CDM.
Use the Administer button to create a new survey session linked to a specific patient encounter or visit.
Trend charts in the Results tab show how scores change over time for patients who completed the instrument multiple times.
